notFound.subtitle: Lost your way?
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved to another route.

metadata.title: Fitup - Calorie & Activity Tracker
metadata.description: Log meals, scan barcodes, track physical activities, and get personalized calorie and macro insights powered by Gemini AI.
